set_pin_code.name: Set PIN Code
set_pin_code.description: Set a new PIN in a given slot

clear_pin_code.name: Clear PIN Code
clear_pin_code.description: Remove the PIN from a given slot

set_rfid_code.name: Set RFID Code
set_rfid_code.description: Set a new RFID code in a given slot

clear_rfid_code.name: Clear RFID Code
clear_rfid_code.description: Remove the RFID code from a given slot

scan_rfid.name: Scan RFID Code
scan_rfid.description: Enable RFID scanning for a given slot

scan_fingerprint.name: Scan Fingerprint
scan_fingerprint.description: Enable fingerprint scanning for a given slot

clear_fingerprint.name: Clear Fingerprint
clear_fingerprint.description: Clear a fingerprint from a given slot

local_program_disable.name: Disable Local Programming
local_program_disable.description: Disable adding PIN/RFID/Fingerprint at the keypad

local_program_enable.name: Enable Local Programming
local_program_enable.description: Enable adding PIN/RFID/Fingerprint at the keypad
